reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Nykia, thank you for taking the time to leave this feedback. We’re glad you enjoyed the taste of the coffee and that we were able to get your order out quickly.

That said, we’re sorry the size and pricing left you disappointed. We completely understand that great coffee also has to feel worth what you paid, and we appreciate you being honest about that. Your comments on both the limited menu and the value perception are important to us, and we’ll be keeping them in mind as we continue improving.

Thank you again for stopping by and for sharing your experience.
reviews_data.review_text: The taste of the coffee was great and there wasn’t a line so I received my order in a timely manner.  The menu is extremely limited but I was still able to get a basic caramel iced coffee. However, I can’t get over the price of this coffee. $7.49 for something that fits in the palm of my hand which is fairly small (and this is the only size offered). The quantity just doesn’t match the price at all in my opinion. I may have been charged extra for oatmilk. I’m honestly not sure. I was very disappointed in this aspect.
Great lattes, coffee, and muffins are delicious

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the kind words Quinn! ^-^
reviews_data.review_text: Jake is great! Just passing through town and so glad I found this spot. Great to see this small cafe serve coffee with such excellence. Arbor is doing a lot with only a little.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Dylan! Appreciate it greatly!!
reviews_data.review_text: Owner was very personable and coffee was very good. Won’t be able to find a better coffee for the price around! Will definitely be going back

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Sara! You’re the absolute goat! ^-^
reviews_data.review_text: Delicious coffee and awesome owner too!! Will definitely be back
I highly recommend this coffee shop. The owner always puts a his own little twist on the iced matcha latte, it’s delicious. Come see for yourself! 😊

reviews_data.owner_answer: Brit! Thank you so much! I appreciate all your kind words and I will uphold them as we continue to grow!
reviews_data.review_text: This place is new, but it's a real gem.  The drinks are delicious.  I highly recommend the iced lavender latte. The owner is friendly, and the sitting area is welcoming.  I'm looking forward to the coffee shop expanding its offerings when it moves from the front lobby into a suite.  We needed an inviting place to hang out in our building, and we got very lucky with Arbor Coffee.
Very cool spot. Like a coffee speakeasy. Great if you are on the way to or from the Loray Athletic Club, or are visiting Loray for any other reason. Try the coffee with lemon!
Highly recommend! Great coffee, great service.
Walked into the coffee shop today and had a great experience. The owner Jake was very personable and very knowledgeable. The coffee was great and I am excited to go back
Jake is a freaking phenomenal barista , solid Christian owned company, highly recommend , if you want only the finest roasted bean water come no further.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks dawg you fr the absolute best!!!😊🙏
reviews_data.review_text: Arbor coffee is a great place to stop in and get some coffee and fellowship! Jake is always a pleasure to see and the coffee is just as good!

Wonderful coffee and great service. I have had the Sticky Bee and Blackberry/Lavender Coffee iced after my gym workouts at the Loray Mill. They have oatly which makes my drink perfect and he freshly grinds the coffee. It is one of my new favorite local coffee spots.

Arbor Coffee in Gastonia, NC, is a great coffee shop. Their lattes are delicious...my favorite  is "The Sticky Bee" with honey and cinnamin. The drip coffee is wonderful too. Its a great place to hang out a while!
Really good latte and had a nice conversation with the owner! Def will be a regular!
Walked in and got a great drip coffee with a fresh and locally sourced croissant.
